name: SQA Conformity Review
description: Software Quality Assurance assures that life-cycle processes and outputs comply with the approved plans and standards (conformity review).
rationale: DO-178C Table A-9: SQA obtains assurance that the software life-cycle processes comply with approved plans and standards, and conducts a software conformity review.

examples.fails: the required objective evidence is absent

source: RTCA DO-178C / EUROCAE ED-12C — Software Considerations in Airborne Systems and Equipment Certification; objectives per Annex A tables A-1 to A-10.
